text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
My schedule's been a little hectic lately... Maybe I
replaced a few too many meals with Toughness
bars.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But they're so convenient and delicious... It's
going to be a struggle to go without them for a
while!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Maybe it'll be okay if I just go with a different
flavor? Like, I could go for shrimp instead of
chocolate...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
No, I've got to deal with all these pimples first!
Ugh, there's no hiding these things!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin seems to be quite worried about the
condition of her skin.
